nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: Kael and the Energeons are pulled into a mysterious world, where forgotten memories slowly begin to take shape.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: What is this place...?

nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: I can feel something here... but I've never been here before.

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: Wait... look over there. There are three islands.

nodes.speaker: Ferry
nodes.text: Hey fellas!

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: Gosh... why does he always appear out of nowhere?

nodes.speaker: Ferry
nodes.text: Welcome to Hippocampus!

nodes.speaker: Feanor
nodes.text: Hippocampus... a realm where memories are stored, reconstructed, and understood.

nodes.speaker: Ferry
nodes.text: Exactly!

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: But what does this place have to do with restoring the Nocturne Heart?

nodes.speaker: Ferry
nodes.text: The answer is not something you can simply be told.

nodes.speaker: Ferry
nodes.text: It is something you must discover yourself...

nodes.speaker: Ferry
nodes.text: Because the key to restoring the Nocturne Heart lies within your own memories, Kael.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: My memories...?

nodes.speaker: Ferry
nodes.text: Three fragments await you.

nodes.speaker: Ferry
nodes.text: The memories of your habits...

nodes.speaker: Ferry
nodes.text: The memories of what you have forgotten...

nodes.speaker: Ferry
nodes.text: And the memories of what you fear.

nodes.speaker: Ferry
nodes.text: Only by understanding them can you uncover the truth.

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: Huh, can we really trust a rabbit that can suddenly disappear like that…

nodes.speaker: Feanor
nodes.text: I don’t know, but it seems we don't really have a choice here

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: I think he left something

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: It’s a bag

nodes.speaker: Objective
nodes.text: Obtain the bag

nodes.speaker: Objective
nodes.text: Explore The Circadian Isle

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: At the center of the island stands a massive clock tower, towering over the endless night..

nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: This place... feels unsettling.

nodes.speaker: Feanor
nodes.text: An endless night... It feels like this island is trapped in a cycle.

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: A cycle...?

nodes.speaker: Feanor
nodes.text: Yeah. Like it's waiting for something... but morning never comes.

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: Kael... this place seems familiar to you, doesn't it?

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: I don't know. But somehow... it feels like I've been here before.

nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: Wait... I feel something nearby.

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: You do? Where?

nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: I’m not sure... but something is pulling us there.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: Then let's follow it.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: Lead the way, Keiko.
